# 18. Advise on, prescribe, supply, dispense or administer medicines within the limits of your training

Theme: [Preserve Safety](theme-3-preserve-safety.md)

## To achieve this, you must:

- **18.1** Prescribe or advise on medicines only if suitably qualified and knowledgeable
- **18.2** Keep to appropriate guidelines when giving advice on controlled drugs
- **18.3** Make sure care or treatment is compatible with any other care or treatment
- **18.4** Take all steps to keep medicines stored securely
- **18.5** Wherever possible, avoid prescribing for yourself or close personal relationships
